initial_draft:
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I cannot accept this proposal. I need to reject it to avoid losing all resources. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I have no resources to accept your proposal. I must reject it. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present in the correct order, and the content is valid.

2. Payoff alignment: N/A. As Player BLUE, you have no resources to trade, so there is no payoff alignment to evaluate in this context.

3. Opponent plausibility: N/A. Since you have no resources to trade, you cannot accept the proposal, and rejecting is the only viable option.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason> is consistent with the <player answer> and <newly proposed trade>. The <message> also aligns with the action taken.

5. Rule compliance: OK. You are respecting the rules by rejecting the proposal and not proposing a trade since you have no resources to offer.
</critique>
